text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian makes a comeback. Unfortunately,
she has lost her edge. Hishi Amazon is shocked to
see this new development.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Narita Brian so frustrated shakes her to
the core. Later, she heads to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, she catches Narita Brian and Symboli
Rudolf on a partner run. Despite the substantial
gap between the two, Narita Brian doesn't give
up and doggedly tries to close the distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite everything, Narita Brian is as eager to run
as ever, and Hishi Amazon is confident she will
climb her way back to the top.
